title: Bachelor of Information Systems
subtitle: Musamus University Merauke
description: Active student of Information Systems, Faculty of Engineering with an interest in Web Development and Artificial Intelligence (Machine Learning, Computer Vision, NLP). Achieved a Cumulative Grade Point Average (GPA) of 3.95 out of 4.00.

title: President of SMART Center
subtitle: Musamus Research and Technology Center
description: Founded and led SMART Center as a hub for research, technology collaboration, and business development for students across majors at Musamus University. Coordinated technology projects, AI integration, and initiated student business units such as Societas Victus.

title: Teaching Assistant
subtitle: Musamus University
description: Guided laboratory sessions for Object-Oriented Programming (Java), Database Design, Web Application Development, Mobile Programming, and Information Systems Projects. Assisted students in debugging, database design, and development of projects based on Machine Learning, Computer Vision, and NLP.

title: Web Developer
subtitle: BAPPERIDA Agency & Bomi Developers
description: Developed a web system for BAPPERIDA (Regional Development Planning, Research, and Innovation Agency) to support document management, information publication, and online proposal submission services to improve administrative efficiency.

title: Web Developer
subtitle: Mappi Regency & Musamus University
description: Built the SIMAPP web system to support structured and transparent monitoring of administration and academic progress for MAPPI scholarship recipient students by advisors, relevant agencies, and the regional government of Mappi Regency.

title: Head of Computer Training Program
subtitle: Mappi Scholarship Program — Musamus University
description: Led and coordinated the basic computer skills training and mentoring program for Mappi scholarship recipient students, covering Microsoft Word, Excel, Canva, and other productivity applications.

title: 2nd Place in Videography
subtitle: Ufonity Udayana Focus
description: Won 2nd place in a national Videography competition organized by UKM Udayana Focus.

title: Head of Education Division & PR Member
subtitle: Information Systems Student Association (HMJ-SI)
description: Responsible for coordinating and supporting various organizational activities (V & VI Congress, HMJ-SI Anniversary, P2CMSI), actively serving as a training speaker, website competition judge, and student academic development program coordinator.
